Grammarly

The world's most popular AI writing and grammar checker

8/10Overall Rating

FreeStarting Price
2009Founded
Free Plan Available

About Grammarly

Grammarly is a ai writing platform founded in 2009. It positions itself as “The world's most popular AI writing and grammar checker” and is best suited for grammar checking, professional emails, academic writing, tone detection. Pricing starts at Free, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Long FormNo
Short FormYes
Seo ToolsNo
TemplatesNo
Tone ControlYes
Plagiarism CheckYes
MultilingualNo
Api AccessYes
Team CollaborationYes
Browser ExtensionYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Industry-leading grammar and style checking
  • Works everywhere via browser extension and desktop app
  • GrammarlyGO AI generation added to premium

Cons

  • Premium is expensive at $12/mo
  • AI generation features lag behind dedicated AI writers
  • English only for core features
